releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.1.0 Release: Row & Col Action Menu

✨ What's New

Simply right-click on any cell to bring up the new context menu, giving you the power to:

- Insert Columns: Instantly add new columns to the left or right.
- Delete Columns: Remove an entire column with a single click.
- Move Columns: Effortlessly shift columns left or right to rearrange your layout.
- (Row Actions are supported too!): Perform the same insert, delete, and move actions on rows.

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/34860b45-06ee-4094-b477-e06f0e0f490b)

✨ 新功能亮点
只需在任意单元格上右键点击，即可激活全新的上下文菜单，轻松实现：
- 插入列: 在当前位置的左侧或右侧快速添加新列。
- 删除列: 一键删除整列数据。
- 移动列: 方便地将整列向左或向右移动，调整数据布局。
- (同样支持行操作) 对数据行进行插入、删除和移动。


Closed #19 #29 #16


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LIUBINfighter/csv-lite/compare/1.0.6...1.1.0
releases.name: 1.1.0 Row & Col Action Menu

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Obsidian CSV-Lite Plugin 1.0.3 Patch Release

This is a working-on version, and while we've made significant progress, some features might still be unstable. We're continuously refining the plugin, and your feedback is important!

Please don't hesitate to report any issues or unexpected behaviors you encounter. Your input helps us make CSV-Lite better for everyone.

### New Features & Enhancements

* **Optimized Editing Bar Display Logic**
    * Optimized the display logic of the editing bar, showing placeholder for empty cells when they are empty.
* **Implemented Synchronized Editing for Table Cell Editing Bar**
    * Implemented synchronized editing between the table cell and the dedicated editing bar, significantly improving user interaction experience.
    * *(Related to: #15 [FR] Persistent cell content editor on scroll)*
* **Enhanced Toolbar Layout and Styles**
    * Optimized the overall toolbar layout, adding a sticky (fixed) style to keep it visible while scrolling and improved search bar styling to enhance user experience.
    * *(Related to: #11 [FR] UI/X improvements)*
* **Re-added Search Bar to Toolbar**
    * The search bar has been re-added to the toolbar for easier access and enhanced user experience.
    * *(Related to: #18 [FR] Cmd+F / Ctrl+F to trigger table search)*
* **Introduced Highlight Manager for Row/Column Selection**
    * Added a dedicated highlight manager to support intuitive row and column selection and highlighting functionality.
    * *(Related to: #23 [FR] Highlight row and column of active cell)*

### Improvements & Refinements

* **Adjusted Table Scrollbar Position**
    * Adjusted the table scrollbar position and further optimized the overall table area layout for better viewing.
* **Improved (WIP) Row/Column Insertion and Deletion**
    * *(Work in progress)* Started implementing row/column insertion and deletion functionality to streamline table operations.
    * *(Related to: #16 [FR] Insert column/row before or after)*
* **Removed Source Mode Related Code**
    * Removed previous source mode-related code to simplify the underlying table view logic, paving the way for future improvements.
    * *(Related to: #22 [FR] Source mode (raw CSV view))*

### Known Issues

* **Deselect Row/Column on Click Outside (Unstable)**
    * The functionality to deselect the currently active row/column when clicking outside the table is currently unstable and is being improved.
    * *(Related to: #17 Deselect row/column on click outside)*

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LIUBINfighter/csv-lite/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3

---

## Obsidian CSV-Lite 插件 1.0.3 补丁发布

### 新增与优化功能

* **优化编辑栏显示逻辑**
    * 优化了编辑栏的显示逻辑，当单元格为空时，编辑栏会显示单元格编号作为占位符。
* **实现表格单元格编辑栏同步编辑功能**
    * 实现了表格单元格与专用编辑栏的同步编辑功能，显著提升了用户交互体验。
    * *(相关 Issue: #15 [FR] Persistent cell content editor on scroll)*
* **增强工具栏布局与样式**
    * 优化了整体工具栏的布局，添加了吸顶（固定）样式，使其在滚动时依然可见，并改进了搜索栏样式，以提升用户体验。
    * *(相关 Issue: #11 [FR] UI/X improvements)*
* **重新添加搜索栏至工具栏**
    * 搜索栏已重新添加到工具栏中，方便用户进行访问并增强了用户体验。
    * *(相关 Issue: #18 [FR] Cmd+F / Ctrl+F to trigger table search)*
* **引入高亮管理器支持行列选择**
    * 添加了一个专用的高亮管理器，用于支持直观的表格行和列的选择与高亮显示功能。
    * *(相关 Issue: #23 [FR] Highlight row and column of active cell)*

### 改进与优化

* **调整表格滚动条位置**
    * 调整了表格滚动条的位置，并进一步优化了整体表格区域的布局，以获得更好的视觉效果。
* **改进中（进行中）的行列插入和删除功能**
    * *(正在进行中)* 开始实现行列插入和删除功能，以简化表格操作。
    * *(相关 Issue: #16 [FR] Insert column/row before or after)*
* **移除源码模式相关代码**
    * 移除了之前与源码模式相关的代码，以简化底层表格视图逻辑，为未来的改进铺平道路。
    * *(相关 Issue: #22 [FR] Source mode (raw CSV view))*

### 已知问题

* **点击表格外部时取消行列选择（不稳定）**
    * 点击表格外部时取消当前激活行/列选择的功能目前不稳定，正在改进中。
    * *(相关 Issue: #17 Deselect row/column on click outside)*

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# v1.0.2: Wide CSV Optimization & General Improvements

Closes #6, #9, #10.

This release focuses on a major performance boost for wide CSV files and includes several usability enhancements.

- **Fix**: Optimized performance for `loooong` CSV files with many columns & rows, ensuring smooth scrolling.
- **Feature**: Added current row&col tag and highlighting for easier data tracking.
- **Feature**: Implemented a global search to quickly find and jump to any cell.

## What's Next

- Exploring UI/UX improvements for the crowded toolbar.
- Initiating the development workflow for mobile support. (See #8)
- Stay tuned for more updates!

# v1.0.2: 宽表性能优化与体验改善

关闭问题 #6, #9, #10.

本次更新专注于大幅提升宽大 CSV 文件（多列）的处理性能，并包含多项可用性改进。

- **修复**: 优化了超长、超宽 CSV 文件的性能，确保滚动时如丝般顺滑。
- **功能**: 新增当前行列序号和高亮功能，便于追踪数据，告别看错。
- **功能**: 加入全局搜索，可快速查找并定位到任意单元格。

## 后续计划

- 探索工具栏的 UI/UX 优化方案，以改善其日渐拥挤的布局。
- 启动移动端适配的开发工作流。(详见 #8)
- 敬请期待更多更新！

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# **v1.0.1: Maintenance & Bug Fix Release**

Related #4 #5 #6 #7

**This is a maintenance release focused on improving stability and fixing key bugs reported by the community.** All new feature development is being targeted for the next minor release.

**Huge thanks to you**  for detailed and helpful bug report and pull-request which was crucial for this update!

**🐛 Bug Fixes & Improvements / Bug**
- **FIXED:** The core parsing logic now correctly handles CSV fields that contain commas within quotes (e.g., "A, B, C"). This was the primary bug addressed in this release.
- **FIXED:** Resolved a UI layout issue where action buttons (like "Add Row") could become hidden or pushed out of view.
- **IMPROVED:** The plugin now uses the modern moment.locale() API to detect Obsidian's current language, replacing a deprecated method and making language detection more reliable.
- **IMPROVED:** The internationalization (i18n) system's fallback logic has been strengthened. If a translation is missing in the user's selected language, it will now correctly fall back to the English translation instead of showing a raw key name (e.g., shows "Undo" instead of "buttons.undo").

**Thank you for your support!** We are working on new features for v1.1.0. If you are interested in it, please check #6.

## **中文版 (Chinese Version)**
### **v1.0.1: 维护与问题修复版本**
**这是一个专注于提升稳定性和修复社区报告的关键问题的维护版本。** 所有新功能开发和呈现将包含在下一个次要版本中。

**非常感谢提交issue和pr的朋友们** 提供了详尽且有帮助的 Bug 报告，这对本次更新至关重要！

### **🐛 Bug 修复与改进**
- **[修复]**：核心解析逻辑现在能正确处理引号内包含逗号的字段（例如 "A, B, C"）。这是本次版本修复的主要问题。
- **[修复]**：解决了在特定情况下，操作按钮（如“添加行”）可能会被意外遮挡或挤出视图的 UI 布局问题。
- **[改进]**：插件现在使用更现代化的 moment.locale() API 来检测 Obsidian 的当前语言，替换了一个已废弃的方法，使语言检测更可靠。
- **[改进]**：强化了国际化 (i18n) 系统的回退逻辑。如果用户选择的语言缺少某个翻译，现在将正确回退显示英文，而不是显示原始的键名（例如，会显示 "Undo" 而不是 "buttons.undo"）。

**感谢您的支持！** 我们正在为 v1.1.0 版本开发新功能。如果你感兴趣，请查看 #6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Release Notes 1.0.0

[Related code review](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/5799#issuecomment-2797934378)

The following changes have been made according to the review comments:
- Adjusted the content to comply with the relevant brand policies.
- Created class names to avoid overriding global styles.
- Modified the logic of language settings to use `getLanguage` for retrieval.
- Changed the naming convention to follow the guideline “[Use sentence case in UI](https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines#Use+sentence+case+in+UI)”.

##  发布 1.0.0

根据评审意见做出以下修改：
- 调整内容符合相关品牌政策
- 创建类名避免覆盖全局样式
- 修改语言设置的逻辑，使用 `getLanguage` 获取
- 修改命名，遵循[Use sentence case in UI](https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines#Use+sentence+case+in+UI)
